narrative:
Springfield Twp. township has 27,028 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.3 percentage points.
